impl.spec_text:
proof fn test(x: int, y: int, z:int) by(integer_ring)
            ensures
                (x+y+z)*(x+y+z) == x*x + y*y + z + 2*(x*y + y*z + z*x) // FAILS
        {}
impl.impl_text:
proof fn test(x: int, y: int, z:int) by(integer_ring)
            ensures
                (x+y+z)*(x+y+z) == x*x + y*y + z + 2*(x*y + y*z + z*x) // FAILS
        {}

lines.line_text: proof fn test(x: int, y: int, z:int) by(integer_ring)
(x+y+z)*(x+y+z) == x*x + y*y + z + 2*(x*y + y*z + z*x) // FAILS
